inline.all_stats.title: All stats
message.already_joined: You are already a participant in this tournament.
message.cannot_identify_user: Could not identify the Telegram user.
message.clean.confirm: Delete all your stats? This action cannot be undone.
message.enter_number_first: Send a number first, for example 20, +20 or -20.
message.group_full: Group is at capacity ({max_group_members} participants max).
message.help:
How to use:

Send a number:
20 - add
+20 - add
-20 - subtract

Then choose an activity with a button.

Commands:
/stat - stats for day, week and month
/day - stats for today
/week - stats for this week
/month - stats for this month
/en - switch to English
/ru - switch to Russian
/clean - clear all stats
/help - help
message.input_error.invalid:
I did not understand the message.

Send a number:
20 - add
+20 - add
-20 - subtract
message.input_error.too_large:
Value is too large.

You can send a number from -{max_amount} to +{max_amount}, except 0.
message.input_error.zero:
Zero does not change stats.

Send a number from -{max_amount} to +{max_amount}, except 0.
For example: 20, +20 or -20.
message.invalid_tournament_days:
Specify the number of days (1 to {max_tournament_days}).
Example: /run 7
message.limit_error:
Cannot {action} {amount_text}.

The total would become {attempted_total}, but the {bound_label} is {bound_value}.
Current total today: {current_text}.
message.no_active_tournament:
No active tournament.
To start one: /run <days>
message.start:
Hi! I can help you track your activity.

How to use:
1. Send a number, for example 20, +20 or -20.
2. Choose an activity with a button.

Examples:
+1000 -> add value
20 -> add value
-20 -> adjust value

/stat - full stats
/day - today
/week - this week
/month - this month
/en - switch to English
/ru - switch to Russian
/clean - clear all stats
/help - help
message.tournament.already_active:
A tournament is already running ({start} — {last_day}).
Check standings: /results
message.tournament.join_success:
You're in! Participant #{participant_count}.
Log your activity and track standings: /results
message.tournament.results.none:
No tournaments yet.
To start one: /run <days>
message.tournament.started:
Tournament started!

Period: {start} — {last_day} ({days} days)

Score = normalized activity points:
1,000 steps = 10
20 squats = 10
10 push-ups = 10
2 plank min = 10
20 abs reps = 10

Check standings: /results
